seams: H-M2 (load-bearing, the maintainer's static-case bet; EXTRAPOLATION ASM-1078 resolves here): a structured canonical medium carrying the authored content gives the SMALLER reasoner a task gain the larger reasoner does not share — operationalised as a positive size x medium interaction (R2 medium lift exceeding R3 medium lift vs content-matched NL) at verifier-off, for at least one structured medium, on engine-derivable composition items. [self-authored/kernel-STYLE/engine-derived-gold rider]

H-M2-NULL (the deflationary alternative, killed or supported symmetrically): any structured-arm advantage is size-indifferent representation formatting or purchased compute; predicts interaction LCBs <= 0 and/or the medium effect within the TTC deflator's reach (K2'). [rider as above]

H-SHRINK (co-primary, the small-model+aligned-authored-store reading): acc(360M, structured medium, verifier on) is non-inferior to acc(1.7B, NL) at the pinned margin at measured cost strictly below the 1.7B-NL cell — the exact contrast f2b-transfer's noninferiority_vs_r3 FAILED without an internal structured medium. [rider as above]

H-M4-STEP (secondary): the step-grain verify-retry loop over the aligned authored store adds accuracy on structured mediums (verifier main effect), more at R2 than R3 (verifier x size interaction) — the f2b loop shape at intermediate-claim grain; the deranged-closure control is expected to collapse the benefit (house expectation, reported-only).

H-ATTR (secondary, deflationary prior DISCLOSED per DECONF-A1/a5/CODEVERT: expected ~0): kernel-grade gloss authoring adds nothing over knull-grade plain typed dialect — TOST within the pinned band kills kernel-content attribution NON-fatally (K3'); the family, if it survives, continues GENERIC and the kernel claim routes to knull-v2/A-F0.
summary: Experiment casc-0: verdict INSTRUMENT-INVALID. Hypotheses: H-M2 (load-bearing, the maintainer's static-case bet; EXTRAPOLATION ASM-1078 resolves here): a structured canonical medium carrying the authored content gives the SMALLER reasoner a task gain the larger reasoner does not share — operationalised as a positive size x medium interaction (R2 medium lift exceeding R3 medium lift vs content-matched NL) at verifier-off, for at least one structured medium, on engine-derivable composition items. [self-authored/kernel-STYLE/engine-derived-gold rider], H-M2-NULL (the deflationary alternative, killed or supported symmetrically): any structured-arm advantage is size-indifferent representation formatting or purchased compute; predicts interaction LCBs <= 0 and/or the medium effect within the TTC deflator's reach (K2'). [rider as above], H-SHRINK (co-primary, the small-model+aligned-authored-store reading): acc(360M, structured medium, verifier on) is non-inferior to acc(1.7B, NL) at the pinned margin at measured cost strictly below the 1.7B-NL cell — the exact contrast f2b-transfer's noninferiority_vs_r3 FAILED without an internal structured medium. [rider as above], H-M4-STEP (secondary): the step-grain verify-retry loop over the aligned authored store adds accuracy on structured mediums (verifier main effect), more at R2 than R3 (verifier x size interaction) — the f2b loop shape at intermediate-claim grain; the deranged-closure control is expected to collapse the benefit (house expectation, reported-only)., H-ATTR (secondary, deflationary prior DISCLOSED per DECONF-A1/a5/CODEVERT: expected ~0): kernel-grade gloss authoring adds nothing over knull-grade plain typed dialect — TOST within the pinned band kills kernel-content attribution NON-fatally (K3'); the family, if it survives, continues GENERIC and the kernel claim routes to knull-v2/A-F0.. Endpoints: primary(primary)=False; coprimary-ni(secondary)=None; sec-engagement-gate(secondary)=True; sec-headroom-gate(secondary)=True; sec-separation-gate(secondary)=False; sec-ttc-match-gate(secondary)=False; sec-k2-deflator(secondary)=False; sec-attr-tost(secondary)=True; sec-verifier-step(secondary)=-0.001666666666666669; sec-deranged(secondary)=True; sec-cost-vector(secondary)=3.933742504149899; sec-m2-null(secondary)=False. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): CASC-0' kills (fixed k=2, 300 engine-derived-gold items, 3 seeds, verifier-off interactions primary; every accuracy on the SELF-AUTHORED / kernel-STYLE / engine-derived-gold corpus — rider on every sentence): (K1') the primary size x medium interaction one-sided 95% BCa lower bound <= 0 for BOTH structured mediums AND the co-primary non-inferiority fails (separation gate valid) => M2 is dead at this scope; H-CN is SHELVED; V-DEC/V-LL do NOT unlock; the maintainer's cost goal reverts to the a-e2 prefill-trim upper bound (18.5-41.7%, consumption unmeasured); the kernel-as-internal-language framing of issue #12 reverts to the knull-v2 channel. (K2') the primary rejected but no Holm-passing structured medium beats the cost-matched 360M-NL+TTC deflator (LB <= 0) => the medium effect is purchased compute; treated exactly as K1'. (K3', NON-FATAL) gloss and plain TOST-equivalent within +/-0.05 at R2/verifier-on => kernel-content attribution dead at scope; the family, if any survives, continues as a GENERIC structured cascade and the kernel claim routes to knull-v2/A-F0. NULL requires TOST (both interactions within +/-0.05 of 0). Degeneracy discipline: verifier non-engagement, baseline saturation, missing size separation (for the co-primary only) and TTC cost-mismatch are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates — they can never read as FAIL, PASS, or NULL. No outcome of this experiment is a feasibility conclusion. Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Binding on any outcome: 2 host rungs (360M, 1.7B) license a SIGN, not a slope; every claim is scoped to <=1.7B stock instruct checkpoints, the self-authored d-casc0 relation-composition corpus (depths 2-4, held-out compositions/depths), ENGINE-DERIVED gold (never external adjudication — this record deliberately does not carry a ground-truth-independence claim; that residual belongs to the f2b-transfer line), the fixed k=2 retry budget, the constrained 7-option answer surface, and the three pinned medium renderings. A PASS licenses exactly ONE thing: the M2 sign exists at oracle-inbound, covered-corpus, <=1.7B scope — the gate to build the rear-seam renderer instrument and plan G3 behind G-NLB. It does NOT license: any W1/real-input claim (the F front-end is not exercised; ret_F 0.42-0.48 measured FAILs stand; the e2e projection acc ~ ret_F x core x fid_R is published only as a product of tagged quantities); any cost headline (parameter-ratio algebra is diagnostic-class; only the measured per-cell KOT-COST vectors bind); any kernel-attribution claim (K3''s separate read; deflationary prior disclosed); any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility 0.3542 at molecules-v0, one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily); any open-ended-generation claim (gamma unexercised; QA/reasoning shapes with compact cores only); any claim about naturalising FOR a model via tuning (all cells stock — this is the static PROMPTED case). A K1'/K2' FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it kills M2 at THIS scope, not the verify-retry mechanism as such (f2b-replicate's audited PASS and f2b-transfer's pending-audit readings stand exactly as issued).
title: Registry verdict: casc-0
